name: Splint — Short Arm (Volar)

cptCodes.display: Application of short arm splint (forearm to hand); static

diagnoses.display: Unspecified fracture of the lower end of right radius, initial encounter for closed fracture

otherSuppliesUsed: Plaster or fiberglass, cotton padding, ace wrap
otherPostInstructions: Ortho F/U in 5–7 days; ice and elevate; return for numbness or color change
